summary.en: A strategic analysis framework for creating uncontested market space through value innovation: simultaneously increasing buyer value and reducing cost by redesigning the factors of competition.
summary.zh: 一套通过价值创新开创无人竞争市场空间的战略分析框架：重新设计行业竞争因素，在提升买方价值的同时降低成本。

sources.label: Chan Kim & Renée Mauborgne · Blue Ocean Strategy · Harvard Business Review Press · 2005 / Expanded Edition 2015
Blue Ocean Strategy official site · What is Blue Ocean Strategy
Osterwalder & Pigneur · Business Model Generation · Wiley · 2010 · Business Model Perspective on Blue Ocean Strategy

references.label: W. Chan Kim & Renée Mauborgne · Blue Ocean Strategy, Expanded Edition · Harvard Business Review Press

note.en: Canonical source for value innovation, Strategy Canvas, ERRC, noncustomers, and market-boundary reconstruction.
note.zh: 价值创新、战略画布、四步动作框架、非顾客和市场边界重构的经典来源。

references.label: Alexander Osterwalder & Yves Pigneur · Business Model Generation · Wiley
references.pages: Strategy chapter: Business Model Perspective on Blue Ocean Strategy

note.en: Connects Blue Ocean Strategy to the Business Model Canvas: value-side changes must be checked against cost, activities, resources, and partners.
note.zh: 把蓝海战略与商业模式画布连接起来：价值侧的改变必须回看成本、活动、资源和伙伴的连锁影响。

references.label: Blue Ocean Strategy · What is Blue Ocean Strategy

note.en: Concise official definition: simultaneous pursuit of differentiation and low cost to create new demand and make competition irrelevant.
note.zh: 官网对蓝海战略的简明定义：同时追求差异化和低成本，创造新需求，并使竞争变得无关紧要。

references.label: Blue Ocean Strategy · 7 Powerful Blue Ocean Strategy Examples

note.en: Public example pool used to prioritize Cirque du Soleil, Yellow Tail, Nintendo Wii, Marvel, Stitch Fix, HealthMedia, Nickel, and related market-creating moves.
note.zh: 公开案例池，用于优先选择太阳马戏团、黄尾袋鼠、任天堂 Wii、漫威、Stitch Fix、HealthMedia、Nickel 以及相关市场创造动作。
